display_name: TOEFL iBT Reading — Vocabulary in Context (Cloze)
instructions: Bilgisayar tabanlıdır; Reading bölümü ~35 dakikadır (genellikle 2 pasaj).
Sorular kelimenin bağlam içindeki anlamına odaklanır.
Her soru 4 seçeneklidir (A, B, C, D).

sections.title: Passage 1
sections.passage: This is an example with the word "__(1)__". I feared they might __(2)__ themselves. This is an example with the word "__(3)__". This is an example with the word "__(4)__". It's __(5)__ here. This is an example with the word "__(6)__". This is an example with the word "__(7)__". This is an example with the word "__(8)__". This is an example with the word "__(9)__". This is an example with the word "__(10)__".

questions.stem: This is an example with the word "______".
questions.explanation: Doğru cevap 'sensorium'. Türkçe karşılığı: -ria) (anat.) sinir sistemi. Telaffuz: —.

meta.source_sentence: This is an example with the word "sensorium".
meta.source_sentence_tr: Bu, "-ria) (anat.) sinir sistemi" kelimesini içeren bir örnektir.

questions.stem: I feared they might ______ themselves.
questions.explanation: Doğru cevap 'injure'. Türkçe karşılığı: incitmek. Telaffuz: /ˈɪndʒɝ/.

meta.source_sentence: I feared they might injure themselves.
meta.source_sentence_tr: Kendilerini incitebileceklerinden korktum.

questions.stem: It's ______ here.
questions.explanation: Doğru cevap 'misty'. Türkçe karşılığı: sisli. Telaffuz: /ˈmɪsti/.

meta.source_sentence: It's misty here.

sections.title: Passage 2
sections.passage: This is an example with the word "__(11)__". This is an example with the word "__(12)__". It isn't easy to be an __(13)__. We need to stop here and __(14)__. questions.stem: It isn't easy to be an ______.
questions.explanation: Doğru cevap 'umpire'. Türkçe karşılığı: hakem. Telaffuz: /ˈəmˌpaɪɝ/.

meta.source_sentence: It isn't easy to be an umpire.
meta.source_sentence_tr: Bir hakem olmak kolay değildir.

questions.stem: We need to stop here and ______.
questions.explanation: Doğru cevap 'refuel'. Türkçe karşılığı: yakıt ikmal etmek. Telaffuz: /ɹifˈjuəɫ/.

meta.source_sentence: We need to stop here and refuel.
meta.source_sentence_tr: Bizim burada durup yakıt almamız gerekir.

questions.stem: Tom is a ______.

questions.stem: Green plants carry out ______.

meta.source_sentence: Green plants carry out photosynthesis.
meta.source_sentence_tr: Yeşil bitkiler fotosentez yaparlar.
